nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: Cecropis
nodes.summary: Cecropis（Cecropis）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联9种鸟类，如Lesser striped swallow、Red-breasted swallow、Greater striped swallow等9种鸟类。

nodes.name: Sri Lanka swallow
nodes.summary: Sri Lanka swallow（Cecropis hyperythra）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Sri Lanka swallow。

nodes.name: Sri Lanka swallow
nodes.summary: The Sri Lanka swallow (Cecropis hyperythra) is a resident breeder endemic to Sri Lanka. It is closely related to the red-rumped swallow, and was formerly considered a subspecies. Description It is a large swallow with a tail which forks deeply, and the combination of deep rufous underside and navy blue rump without any marks is a unique feature of this species. Its rufous underside can be used to tell it apart from the red-rumped swallow. It is a passerine, which means it has three toes pointing forward and one pointing backward, allowing it to perch. Habitat It is found in a variety of open country habitats in both the lowlands and foothills in Sri Lanka, including farm fields and lightly wooded areas. Behaviour It usually lives in pairs or small groups. References Rasmussen, P.C., and J.C. Anderton. 2005. Birds of South Asia. The Ripley guide. Volume 2: attributes and status. Smithsonian Institution and Lynx Edicions, Washington D.C. and Barcelona
